stream_done_contract.details: Streaming requests did not preserve the expected SSE contract.

tools_passthrough_contract.details: Tool definitions/tool_choice are currently stripped before the provider request, which blocks OpenRouter tool-calling parity.

compliance_report:
# OpenRouter Compliance Readiness Report

Generated: 2026-04-04T01:21:23.758Z
Readiness: FAIL
Checks: 2/8 passing
Blocking failures: 5
Non-blocking failures: 1

## Check Results

- [PASS] models_contract (blocking) — GET /v1/models returns an OpenAI-compatible list payload
  Model catalog contract matches the OpenAI list shape expected by OpenRouter.
  evidence: status=200
  evidence: model_present=true
- [PASS] auth_required (blocking) — POST /v1/chat/completions rejects requests without a renter API key
  Auth guard correctly rejects anonymous requests with an OpenAI-style authentication error.
  evidence: status=401
  evidence: error_type=authentication_error
- [FAIL] billing_guard (blocking) — POST /v1/chat/completions rejects renters without enough balance
  Billing guard did not return the expected 402 billing error.
  evidence: status=503
  evidence: error_type=server_error
- [FAIL] chat_completion_proxy (blocking) — POST /v1/chat/completions proxies a healthy completion response
  Healthy completion requests failed to proxy through the /v1 surface.
  evidence: status=503
  evidence: content=missing
- [FAIL] stream_stability (blocking) — Streaming responses preserve SSE headers and emit a DONE terminator
  Streaming requests did not preserve the expected SSE contract.
  evidence: status=503
  evidence: content_type=application/json; charset=utf-8
  evidence: done_seen=false
- [FAIL] tool_result_roundtrip (non_blocking) — Assistant tool_calls and tool result messages survive the proxy transform
  Tool call conversation history was dropped or malformed before reaching the provider.
  evidence: assistant_tool_calls=0
  evidence: tool_message_seen=false
- [FAIL] tool_definition_passthrough (blocking) — Tool definitions and tool_choice are forwarded to the provider
  Tool definitions/tool_choice are currently stripped before the provider request, which blocks OpenRouter tool-calling parity.
  evidence: tools_forwarded=0
  evidence: tool_choice_forwarded=false
- [FAIL] mid_stream_failure_handling (blocking) — Mid-stream provider failures are surfaced cleanly to QA
  Mid-stream provider disconnects currently terminate the stream without a clean OpenRouter-style error or DONE terminator.
  evidence: fetch_error=none
  evidence: done_seen=false
  evidence: body_prefix={"error":{"message":"No inference providers available for this model","type":"se

## Leadership Handoff

- Blocking: billing_guard, chat_completion_proxy, stream_stability, tool_definition_passthrough, mid_stream_failure_handling
- Non-blocking: tool_result_roundtrip
